summary: Tested Admin Projects CRUD fix (recurring critical issue). Backend API fully working: /api/admin/projects returns ALL projects, CRUD operations (Create/Read/Update/Delete) all pass. Frontend loads admin projects page correctly showing projects table. UI shows projects with Edit/Delete buttons. Form requires image field (validation works). Backend tests: 11/11 passed.
critical_code_review_comments: NEW /api/admin/projects endpoint correctly returns ALL projects (no filter) vs public /api/projects which filters published=True
Admin endpoint has no-cache headers preventing stale data
Frontend getAdminProjects() correctly calls /api/admin/projects with auth headers and cache: 'no-store'
loadProjects() in page.tsx correctly calls getAdminProjects() after Create/Update/Delete operations
Delete handler updates local state immediately (setProjects filter) + reloads from server for consistency

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Admin page loads, table displays, buttons work

seed_data_creation: Test projects created/deleted during testing (all cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Projects CRUD fix verified working. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/projects (returns ALL projects for admin), POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/projects/{id} for CRUD. Public GET /api/projects filters published=True. Form validation requires image field. All data-testid attributes present on edit/delete buttons.

admin_projects_endpoint.GET /api/admin/projects: PASS - Returns ALL projects (20 when test project exists)

crud_operations.CREATE: PASS - POST /api/admin/projects creates project, returns {message, id}
crud_operations.READ: PASS - Project appears in list immediately after create
crud_operations.DELETE: PASS - DELETE /api/admin/projects/{id} removes project, returns 404 for non-existent

frontend_ui.projects_page_loads: PASS - Shows table with columns: PROJECT, LOCATION, TYPE, YEAR, ACTIONS
frontend_ui.add_project_modal: PASS - Opens correctly with form fields
frontend_ui.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Each row has edit (blue) and delete (red) buttons with data-testid
frontend_ui.form_validation: PASS - Title, Slug, Location, Type, Year required; Image marked required

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Admin page was previously using public /api/projects endpoint which filters by published=True, causing unpublished projects to not appear
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: New /api/admin/projects endpoint added that returns ALL projects without filtering
rca_of_the_issue.frontend_change: loadProjects() now calls getAdminProjects() which fetches from /api/admin/projects
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Backend tests confirm admin endpoint returns more projects than public endpoint when unpublished projects exist
